  assert_equals: Sec-Fetch-Dest expected "document" but got "empty"
[FAIL] Sec-Fetch-Mode
  assert_equals: Sec-Fetch-Mode expected "navigate" but got "no-cors"

  assert_equals: Sec-Fetch-Dest expected "document" but got "empty"
[FAIL] Sec-Fetch-Mode with redirects
  assert_equals: Sec-Fetch-Mode expected "navigate" but got "no-cors"
